zh: 我昨天去了商店，买了一些食物。
en: I went to the store yesterday and bought some food.

zh: 她现在正在学习，因为明天有考试。
en: She is studying now because she has an exam tomorrow.

zh: 他已经完成了作业，现在在看电视。
en: He has finished his homework and is now watching TV.

zh: 当我到达时，他们已经离开了。
en: When I arrived, they had already left.

zh: 她每天早上跑步，但今天她在游泳。
en: She runs every morning, but today she is swimming.

zh: 他们上周去了巴黎，玩得很开心。
en: They went to Paris last week and had a great time.

zh: 我已经在这里住了五年了。
en: I have lived here for five years.

zh: 当电话响时，她正在洗澡。
en: She was taking a shower when the phone rang.

zh: 到明年，他将已经学了三年中文了。
en: By next year, he will have studied Chinese for three years.

zh: 如果我有更多时间，我就会学一门新语言。
en: If I had more time, I would learn a new language.

zh: 她自从上个月就一直在准备这次演讲。
en: She has been preparing for this speech since last month.

zh: 在他们到达之前，我已经准备好了一切。
en: I had prepared everything before they arrived.

zh: 明天这个时候，我将正在飞往伦敦。
en: I will be flying to London at this time tomorrow.

zh: 他希望他当时没有放弃。
en: He wishes he had not given up.

zh: 她已经等了两个小时了，但他还没有来。
en: She has been waiting for two hours, but he has not come yet.

zh: 太阳每天从东方升起。
en: The sun rises in the east every day.

zh: 当我进来时，他正在打电话。
en: He was talking on the phone when I came in.

zh: 她明天会参加会议吗？
en: Will she attend the meeting tomorrow?

zh: 他们已经讨论了这个问题好几天了。
en: They have been discussing this problem for several days.

zh: 如果她当时更努力，她就会成功了。
en: If she had worked harder, she would have succeeded.

zh: 到这个月底，他将已经完成了这个项目。
en: By the end of this month, he will have completed the project.

zh: 在他找到工作之前，他已经求职了好几个月了。
en: He had been looking for a job for months before he found one.

zh: 她打算下周去旅行。
en: She is going to travel next week.

zh: 当他们结婚时，他们已经相识了十年了。
en: When they got married, they had known each other for ten years.

zh: 我从未去过澳大利亚，但我希望有一天能去。
en: I have never been to Australia, but I hope to go one day.

zh: 她昨晚在看书时睡着了。
en: She fell asleep while she was reading last night.

zh: 到她退休时，她将已经在这家公司工作了三十年了。
en: By the time she retires, she will have worked in this company for thirty years.

zh: 他的眼睛很红，因为他一直在哭。
en: His eyes were red because he had been crying.

zh: 要不是你的帮助，我就不会成功了。
en: But for your help, I would not have succeeded.

zh: 她通常坐公交上班，但今天她在开车。
en: She usually takes the bus to work, but today she is driving.

zh: 当警察到达时，小偷已经逃跑了。
en: When the police arrived, the thief had already escaped.

zh: 他们明年将会搬到新城市。
en: They will move to a new city next year.

zh: 她已经学钢琴学了十年了，弹得非常好。
en: She has been learning piano for ten years and plays very well.

zh: 如果我是你，我就会接受那份工作。
en: If I were you, I would accept that job.

zh: 到明天早上，工人们将已经修好了这条路。
en: By tomorrow morning, the workers will have repaired the road.

zh: 在她出发之前，她已经检查了好几遍行李了。
en: She had checked her luggage several times before she set off.

zh: 他们正在建造一座新桥，预计明年完工。
en: They are building a new bridge, which is expected to be completed next year.

zh: 我希望我当时能做出更好的选择。
en: I wish I had made a better choice then.

zh: 当她意识到错误时，已经太晚了。
en: By the time she realized the mistake, it was already too late.

zh: 他每天练习英语，已经进步了很多。
en: He practices English every day and has improved a lot.

zh: 当我打电话给她时，她正在和朋友吃饭。
en: She was having dinner with friends when I called her.

zh: 到下个月，他们将已经在一起五年了。
en: By next month, they will have been together for five years.

zh: 在他们解决问题之前，他们已经争论了好几天了。
en: They had been arguing for days before they solved the problem.

zh: 她打算明年申请研究生。
en: She is going to apply for graduate school next year.

zh: 如果只是我能再有一次机会就好了。
en: If only I could have one more chance.
